steps.goal: Review all stored memories about discussion group members and community interactions
Search for specific preferences or interaction patterns related to community members
Store new information about a community member's preferences or interaction style
Clean up outdated or incorrect memories about community members

user_agent_config.personality: Empathetic and community-minded, values personal growth and supportive relationships. Prefers warm, encouraging communication and values knowing individual preferences to better support group members.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Familiar with discussion group dynamics and community building concepts. Does not know technical details about memory systems or tool APIs.

end_condition: The user has reviewed existing memories, searched for relevant preferences, added new community member information, and cleaned up any outdated entries as needed.
goals: Review all stored memories about discussion group members and community interactions
Search for specific preferences or interaction patterns related to community members
Store new information about a community member's preferences or interaction style
Clean up outdated or incorrect memories about community members
